/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g --coverage CMakeFiles/core_tests.dir/test_module.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_tests.dir/test_neuralnet_create.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_tests.dir/test_neuralnet_learning.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_tests.dir/test_adaptive.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_tests.dir/test_brain_cow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_tests.dir/__/python/nimcp_module.c.o -o core_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin /home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin/libnimcp.so.2.6.2 ../../lib/libgtest.a ../../lib/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -lpthread -llz4 -ljansson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so ../../lib/libgtest.a
